name: Orange Blossom Jello Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the cake a day or two before using in the recipe.
2. Drain the Mandarin oranges and save the juice.
3. Prepare the jello using 1 cup boiling water and 1 cup cold water (use juice and add water for the difference).
4. Let the jello set to the consistency of egg whites.
5. While the jello is cooling, beat the Dream Whip in a large bowl until stiff peaks form.
6. When the jello reaches the right consistency, whip it gently.
7. Add the whipped Jello into the whipped Dream Whip and mix well.
8. Tear the cake into bite-sized pieces.
9. Add the whipped Jello-Dream Whip mixture to the cake pieces.
10. Cut 2 tins of oranges in half and add them to the mixture.
11. Mix everything together well.
12. Place the whole mixture back in an angel food pan and chill for at least 24 hours.
13. Unmold the cake and frost with whipped cream.
14. Decorate with the oranges from the third tin.
For a change, you might substitute strawberry jello and fresh strawberries or raspberry jello and fresh raspberries for the orange.
